articles.headline: Mexico City ups security, caps crowds for England after fan deaths
articles.description: Mexico will double security and limit capacity at the monument known as the "Angel of Independence" and at the fan festival in Mexico City's main square for Sunday's Mexico-England World Cup match.

articles.headline: Lionel Messi says Argentina have 'many' bad things to correct
articles.description: Lionel Messi said Argentina have "many" things to improve after a nail-biting 3-2 win over Cape Verde in extra time on Friday night at Hard Rock Stadium in Miami, pointing out his team's shortcomings in the round-of-32 victory.

images.name: Arg woe vs Cape Verde_260703 [1296x729]
images.caption: Lionel Messi and Argentina needed extra time to beat Cape Verde, the 67th ranked team in FIFA, on Friday.

articles.headline: Zlatan Ibrahimović sends support to Harry Souttar, Lucas Herrington after penalty misses
articles.description: The Socceroos and Zlatan Ibrahimović have rallied around Harry Souttar and Lucas Herrington, after their missed penalties in Australia's World Cup shoutout loss to Egypt

images.caption: The football world is rallying around Socceroos youngster Lucas Herrington.

images.caption: Harry Souttar of Australia reacts after missing a penalty vs. Egypt.
